headline: President Japan, Perion
summary: Result-driven and proactive Digital Transformation Professional with more than 20 years’ expertise in business development and strategy planning with particular experience working with both domestic & overseas clients, and partners. • Significant overseas business expansion, especially in the APAC region with firm sense of corporate mission within a different cultural background. • Professional experience with C-level management, new business development, and strategy planning. • Strong client-relationship building skills and implementation of new business strategy. • Proven and consistent track record of exceeding revenue targets and reducing execution time on projects. BUSINESS TRANSFORMATION / BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT / BUSINESS EXPANSION / GLOBAL BUSINESS MANAGEMENT / PARNTERSHIPS / SALES / TRAINING DIGITAL MARKETING / MOBILE MARKETING / LOCATION BASED MARKETING OUTDOOR MEDIA / DIGITAL PUBLISING / PROGRAMMATIC

experiences.title: President Japan
experiences.description: Perion is the global ad tech leader helping agencies, brands and media owners get better results with their marketing investments by providing advanced technology across all major digital channels.

experiences.title: Founder & CEO
experiences.description: A consulting firm for business transformation in advertising & media industries.

experiences.title: President & CEO
experiences.description: Joint venture company between NTTDOCOMO & Dentsu runs digital OOH (DOOH) ad marketplace. • Build and operate an online platform enabling multiple advertisers to purchase space across numerous DOOH media, conducting advertising space sales based on impressions, the first for Japan in the DOOH market • Conduct advertising space sales optimized in accordance with targets by utilizing the population distribution statistic data of Mobairu Kukan Tokei™ (mobile spatial statistics) based on DOCOMO mobile phone network operating data and visualizing the number of people according to gender, age and other categories for each segment that were in the vicinity of the advertising placement for each day of the week and time slot. • Develop and provide advertising products with new added value, including interactive linkage between DOOH and smartphones carried by people nearby.

experiences.title: Director, Tech & Data Intelligence Department, Out Of Home Media Services Department
experiences.description: • Innovating on the traditional outdoor media business model with bringing digital advertising solutions and scheme. • Establishing Posterscope Japan as a member of the Posterscope Network (one of the agency brands of the Dentsu Aegis Network, specialized in outdoor media services covering over 30 countries in the world).

experiences.company: Dentsu Digital Holdings, Inc. Singapore Branch
experiences.title: Regional Director
experiences.description: Business Management Company focused on digital communications. • Spearheaded Dentsu’s Consultancy Service for Digital Publishers expansion into the APAC region. • Searched and evaluated prominent digital venture companies in the APAC region for investment through the Dentsu Digital Fund.

experiences.title: Regional Director
experiences.description: Largest interactive media representative and subsidiary of Dentsu Inc. • Guided cci’s business line into Asian markets and established the company’s first office abroad. • Obtained 15 new service distributor partners in 7 countries across ASEAN regions who are able to increase their revenue working with local premium publishers using cci’s ad platform. • Formulated annual and mid-term marketing strategies to evaluate the market size, growth rates, and demands for ad technology platforms in order to set up new sales channels in each ASEAN country. • Generated more than 1 Billion impressions per month from scratch for premium and local publishers in the ASEAN region by establishing the Digital AdExchange Marketplace.

experiences.title: General Manager
experiences.description: • Cultivated clients in new markets by releasing industrial market research reports and speaking at major ad technology events such as; ad:tech Tokyo and Mobile Marketing Association Forums. • Pioneered market research and end-user insight tests which were the first such research in the industry. • Trained 12 team members on best practices for ‘smart’ marketing consultation with clients. • Reported directly to the CEO on market research and strategic partner candidates. • Introduced annual and mid-term marketing strategies for smartphone advertising using easy apps development tools as well as presentations to over 100 clients on the effectiveness of Aired Marketing. • Accounted for over 100M Yen in sales from scratch in the second half of the fiscal year. • Initiated the establishment of the new regional headquarter focused on mobile device marketing.

experiences.title: Trustee
experiences.description: International Christian University, known as "ICU" was established in 1953 as the first liberal arts college in Japan. Providing scholarship to nurture educated citizens in Japan was the slogan that led many to support donations in Japan and the U.S. This was the inception of an unprecedented four-year liberal arts college in Japan. Emphasis on liberal arts, with its interdisciplinary approach and instruction in small classes, has not changed since the founding days. Trustee, International Christian University Help the university to keep pursuit three main commitments through board of trustees; • Academic Commitment: ICU was founded with a mission to pursue truth, defend academic freedom and enrich inner freedom. • Christian Commitment: ICU’s commitment to a Christian philosophy enables us to explore and develop all dimensions of the human existence, including the religious. • International Commitment: ICU was established shortly after World War II, its founding philosophy embracing a supranational perspective based on deep reflection about the war. On the Mitaka campus, people from different nations and cultures live, study and work together, to form an international community.

experiences.title: Supervisor
experiences.description: Mobile Media Department providing mobile marketing solutions and planning. • Managed 2B Yen sales budget and controlled gross profit of more than 110M Yen. • Trained and managed a team of 40 people on basic and advanced mobile advertising. • Built close relationships amongst mobile carriers as well as mobile content providers and released a new mobile media application for TV broadcasting program guide (G-Guide). • Exceeded 2B Yen sales target by 103% (2.06B Yen) and 152M Yen in gross profit against a target of 110M Yen. • Re-structured the team in order to more clearly define each member’s roles and more efficiently propose directory to the right person in the right division. • Developed and improved several mobile media services to cultivate non-mobile using clients through cross-platform media planning methods, such as Mobile + TV for example. • Strong relationship building with major mobile media companies by setting up periodical seminars.

experiences.company: 電衆数碼（北京）広告有限公司 / &c. Inc.
experiences.title: Chairman & CEO
experiences.description: Internet marketing company established by Dentsu and Focus Media. • Established this joint venture company 3 months ahead of schedule (in only 3 months). • Incorporated SAP system to ensure transparency of the business flow. • Guided core competencies in digital marketing field for Dentsu groups in a very competitive Chinese internet advertising market. • Achieved 169% sales target of 8M RMB as PAT in the first fiscal year against a target of 4.75M RMB. • Direct reporting to the regional VP of Dentsu as well as East Asia market Board Members and managed corporate governance systems in China which were policies handed down from headquarters. • Managed and trained over 100 local employees.

experiences.title: Corporate Representative Executive Vice President & COO
experiences.description: Mobile media and marketing solutions provider. • Initiated the joint venture project between J-PHONE and Dentsu as a project leader to establish a world-wide new business for mobile advertising which was born in Japan. • Elevated the company’s revenue into the black in less than 1 year since the loan was given to start the joint venture and was able to reduce incremental loss to zero within 2 years. • Generated over US$4M in new revenue from scratch through mobile phone advertising market. • Managed and trained over 40 employees. • Revolutionized the content development business using a very new concept known today as ‘cloud service’, which J-MOBILE was able to establish an easy mobile content development platform that cut the content creation time in half from 4 to 2 weeks. • Released cutting edge mobile push media solutions using location based technology, so that a company could deliver a message simultaneously to over 10 million users with geo targeting capability.

experiences.title: Copywriter, Account Executive
experiences.description: Dentsu Inc. is the world largest advertising agency with over 6,000 employees. Creative Direction Department, Account Management Department, working for Teleco and IT clients. • Introduced the first pro baseball league internet broadcast to the public by developing Japan’s first broadband content portal in cooperation with Yahoo! Japan and Cisco Systems in 2000. • Developed the first high school baseball game broadcast using both internet and mobile phone technology in cooperation with J-PHONE, Japan Telecom, and Mainichi Daily Newspaper. • Established web-card business with Japan Telecom, a pre-paid web access card sponsored by advertisers
